summary: A vertical DHS-produced motion-graphics spot built around a Trump voiceover ('Leave now. If you don't, we will find you, and we will deport you') with kinetic 'LEAVE NOW' typography over a textured navy wall, followed by a sequence of grayscale criminal mugshots on red backgrounds, each captioned with charges (lewd acts with a minor, narcotics and assault, child pornography) and stamped with the DHS seal. Although stylized DHS branding, it is a speech-voiceover-driven slogan/threat message graphic and mugshot card sequence rather than a music-driven cinematic or genre spectacle, so it does not meet the youth-appeal produced-entertainment criterion (no music track; likely_music_driven is false).
notable_text: LEAVE NOW; LEWD AND LASCIVIOUS ACTS WITH A MINOR; NARCOTICS AND ASSAULT; 100 COUNTS OF POSSESSION OF CHILD PORNOGRAPHY; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; VO: 'Leave now. If you don't, we will find you, and we will deport you. You will never return.'
